Crop Name: sunflower

Profile
- Season type: medium-season (TSUM total=2180 C.d)
- Temperature adaptation: cool-adapted (TBASEM=3.00 C)
- Development driver: temperature + daylength (IDSL=1, DLO=14.00 h)
- Root/water trait: deep-rooted, moderately drought-tolerant (RDMCR=150.00 cm, DEPNR=3.50)
- Assimilation trait: lower assimilation potential (AMAX peak=36.00)
- Storage allocation: late storage allocation (FOTB onset DVS=1.22)

Nutrient capacity proxies (leaf maxima)
- NMAXLV: DVS0=0.0600, DVS1=0.0300
- PMAXLV: DVS0=0.0093, DVS1=0.0047
- KMAXLV: DVS0=0.1000, DVS1=0.0500

Use guidance
- Treat this as prior knowledge for zero-shot policy transfer.
- Final action should still adapt to current weather/soil observations.
